extraction.one_line_summary: KUN Stefan soloed to victory from an early break, gaining 59 seconds as the peloton inexplicably failed to organize any chase
tactical_patterns: Kun targeted presumed sprint stage with skin suit preparation, revealing value in attacking 'guaranteed' sprint finishes when teams assume chase
No team took chase responsibility despite peloton losing only 10 seconds in final 10km, exposing coordination failure on transitional stages

rider_signals.KUN Stefan: positive: won solo by 59 seconds on sprint stage, executes same tactical pattern every two years suggesting repeatable niche strength
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: defended GC lead at 10 seconds but team failed to control breakaway on stage profile suited to chase
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: remains 13-14 seconds down but showed no initiative when peloton chase collapsed
